title: ItemDuper-Pro
description: Perfect for players who want convenient item duplication with modern improvements and reliable functionality.
body:
# ItemDuper-Pro

**A recreated and enhanced version of the original DupeTrigger mod by AstraLucid**

## What it does
Press a single keybind to instantly duplicate items in your main hand - no commands, no cheats required!

## Key Features
- **One-key duplication** - Default 'G' key (fully customizable)
- **Enhanced stack limits** - Duplicate up to 2,048 items per stack
- **Server-side synchronization** - Real duplication that persists when moved or placed
- **Customizable controls** - Change keybind in Controls menu under "ItemDuper-Pro"
- **No cheats needed** - Works in survival mode and multiplayer servers
- **Smart inventory management** - Handles full inventories gracefully

## How to Use
1. Hold any item in your main hand
2. Press 'G' (or your custom keybind)
3. Watch your items double instantly!
4. Repeat to keep doubling (1→2→4→8→16→32→64→128→256→512→1024→2048)

## Configuration
- Open **Options → Controls → Key Binds**
- Find **"ItemDuper-Pro"** category
- Set your preferred key for **"Duplicate Item"**

## Requirements
- **Fabric Loader 0.16.14+**
- **Fabric API**

## Credits
- **Original concept**: AstraLucid (DupeTrigger mod)
- **Enhanced recreation**: Void

---
*Perfect for creative building, testing, and convenient item management!*
